name: Franchise Architect: Football
currentFocus: Session 53 exhausted six audited objectives and five second-order innovations: transactional post-commit hydration truth, source-bound direct-test receipts, a persistent tactical identity arc, one explainable desktop/mobile command center, contextual local evidence moments, exact proprietary footer enforcement, tactical previews, local evidence trends, source-aware innovation scanning, and public-boundary cleanup.
nextMilestone: Hold launch until same-origin hosted revision evidence, canonical custom-origin health/headers, a real received-message receipt, founder approval, and authoritative lifecycle reconciliation are all current.
blockers: Launch/SPARKED remains evidence-gated: current hosted staging scores 3/10, canonical project health/headers are incomplete, literal recent CI history is 3/5, football@playfranchisearchitect.com lacks a real received-message receipt, founder approval is absent, and authoritative registry SPARKED conflicts with local FORGE truth.

testSuiteStatus.coverage: Session 53 direct evidence: full Node suite 444/444, Playwright 18/18, Pages build/smoke, and responsive evidence 20/20 with dark/light desktop/mobile inspection.
testSuiteStatus.uiSuiteNote: Playwright 18/18 plus 20 responsive captures; light-theme active navigation contrast is explicitly asserted.

highlights: Priority Inbox (CRITICAL/IMPORTANT/FLAVOR tiers, bell badge, slide-in drawer)
Live Sim-Watch overlay (300ms animated drive log, key play cards)
Franchise Moment card (cinematic post-game drama + share button)
GM Decision modal (pre-advance choices on critical weeks)
Cap War Room (4-year visual cap timeline, color-coded risk zones)
Trade Breakdown card (A-F letter grades, fairness verdict)
Season Narrative Arcs (3 dynamic story threads per season)
GM Persona progress bar + confetti tier-up burst
SimJob TTL cleanup (10-min eviction, prevents OOM)
5 new API endpoints (season-arcs, gm-decision, records/franchise, team-archetypes, franchise-moment)
Mobile 375px overflow fixes across all new modals

passed: full canonical Node suite 444/444 with direct exit 0
lastVerification.diagnosticNote: Launch remains HOLD on hosted same-origin revision evidence, canonical health/edge, received email, founder approval, CI 5/5, and registry reconciliation. Local same-revision staging evidence is green; no external evidence was fabricated.

freeTierAuditNote: Verified S138 #753: pure browser game, no LLM/email/per-user backend calls. Static deploy.
